title: Enable Customizations Battery and Gantt Chart Widgets on Project Overviews
excerpt: The Project Overview is a great addition to the work management package. However, only having the default settings for the Battery and Gantt Chart widgets is disappointing. For example, we utilize the Battery’s weighting…

posts.author: JustinThibault (Justin Thibault)
posts.cookedHtml: The Project Overview is a great addition to the work management package. However, only having the default settings for the Battery and Gantt Chart widgets is disappointing. For example, we utilize the Battery’s weighting based on associated resources to more accurately reflecting project progress than arbitrary items.
